headline: Dow and Nasdaq plunge 2% as Amazon data centres hit in Iran war
summary: 10.32am: Iran is 'not just oil any more' as AWS damage moves dial US stocks have extended their slide, with selling accelerating asthe first hour of trading ticks past. The Dow is now down 1,244 points or 2.5% at 47,650, while its descent has been overtaken by the Nasdaq, which has plunged...

headline: Freeport McMoRan Stock Slides as the Iran Conflict Hits Commodities
summary: Freeport McMoRan  stock plummeted Tuesday, along with shares of other metals and mining companies, as commodities declined in a risk-off trade tied to U.S. military action in Iran.  Shares of the copper miner slid 10.1% in midday trading at $61.36, while the broader market struggled.

headline: A Closer Look at the Stock Carnage
summary: Stocks tumbled broadly, with fears regarding access to the Strait of Hormuz escalating.    Major U.S. stock indexes slumped more than 2%. The Dow industrials fell 2.4%, on pace for its worst day since April's tariff selloff.

headline: The Strait of Hormuz is facing a blockade. These countries will be most impacted
summary: A closure of the Strait of Hormuz would send shock waves through global energy markets, but the pain would be felt most acutely in Asia.
